title: Correct Product Name in Footer Copyright Text
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the footer to display the correct product name 'DataTools Pro' instead of 'Data Tools Pro', so that the branding is consistent throughout the application.
description:
The footer copyright text uses an incorrect product name with a space: "Data Tools Pro" instead of the correct "DataTools Pro" (no space).

## Change
- From: `© 2024 Data Tools Pro. All rights reserved.`
- To: `© 2024 DataTools Pro. All rights reserved.`
acceptance_criteria: Footer copyright reads '© 2024 DataTools Pro. All rights reserved.'
Product name 'DataTools Pro' has no space between 'Data' and 'Tools'
ux_changes: Corrected product name in footer from 'Data Tools Pro' to 'DataTools Pro' for brand consistency.
implementation_notes: Simple text change in the footer template to correct the product name spelling.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the text change and deployed to staging.
